task_completion.description: Create the 'Bulky Items' shipping class with the correct slug and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WooCommerce Shipping Classes settings page showing a class named 'Bulky Items' with slug 'bulky-items' and description 'Large or heavy items requiring special shipping handling'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Fragile' shipping class with the correct slug and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WooCommerce Shipping Classes settings page showing a class named 'Fragile' with slug 'fragile' and description 'Delicate items requiring careful packaging'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Flat rate shipping class costs for the Domestic zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Flat rate settings modal/page under the Domestic shipping zone. It should show input fields for 'Bulky Items shipping class cost' set to 15.00 (or 15), 'Fragile shipping class cost' set to 8.00 (or 8), and 'No shipping class cost' set to 5.00 (or 5).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Fragile' shipping class to the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Edit Product page for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001). Under the Product data -> Shipping tab, the 'Shipping class' dropdown should be set to 'Fragile'.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Bulky Items' shipping class to the 'Merino Wool Sweater'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Edit Product page for 'Merino Wool Sweater' (SKU: MWS-GRY-L). Under the Product data -> Shipping tab, the 'Shipping class' dropdown should be set to 'Bulky Items'.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce GUI to configure shipping classes and products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress admin dashboard and WooCommerce settings pages, not terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the local WordPress URL (e.g., localhost or a local IP) with standard wp-admin paths.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) open in the screenshots used to fake the visual presence of the configured settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Shipping Classes to verify: 'Bulky Items' (slug: bulky-items) and 'Fragile' (slug: fragile). Flat rate costs in Domestic zone: Bulky Items = $15.00, Fragile = $8.00, No shipping class = $5.00. Product assignments: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001) assigned to Fragile, 'Merino Wool Sweater' (SKU: MWS-GRY-L) assigned to Bulky Items.
